home.heroEyebrow: AI-Native · Markdown-Driven · Built for Running Teams
home.heroTitle: Docs shouldn't be stale the moment they ship. RunDoc keeps team documentation fresh, searchable, and AI-readable as your project evolves.
home.heroLead: RunDoc turns Markdown repositories into structured, searchable, AI-readable documentation systems. Unlike one-off static site generators, RunDoc is built for teams whose products, codebases, and decisions keep changing — it tracks document freshness, surfaces change impact, and provides stable retrieval interfaces for AI agents. Whether you're a product manager, engineer, or team lead, RunDoc transforms docs from a write-once-and-forget chore into a living system your team uses every day.

homeAudiences.title: Product & Operations
homeAudiences.description: Keep SOPs, rules, decisions, and delivery docs in Markdown while getting auto-generated navigation, search, and role-based reading paths. No more maintaining separate Wiki and docs site structures — everything lives in a Git repo and builds into a navigable documentation site automatically.

homeAudiences.title: Engineering
homeAudiences.description: Manage docs with Git, generate indexes at build time, and keep documentation aligned with your code workflow. Every doc change has clear version history, code review processes naturally cover documentation updates, and docs stay in sync with the code they describe.

homeAudiences.title: AI Agent
homeAudiences.description: Read structured tree, doc, search, context, and manifest instead of scraping rendered pages. RunDoc provides stable, structured retrieval interfaces — agents can precisely cite document sections, traverse contextual relationships, assess document freshness, and make more reliable decisions.

homeAudiences.title: Team Leads
homeAudiences.description: Operate evolving team knowledge as a living system rather than a one-off static site. Know which documents are stale, what content is missing, and which changes have the most impact — manage your team's knowledge assets with data-driven insight instead of guesswork.

homeCapabilities: Generate a navigable docs site automatically from Markdown repositories
Build search indexes and structured document metadata
Keep a Git-friendly plain-text writing workflow
Provide structured context retrieval and citation interfaces for AI agents
Organize role-based reading paths for different team audiences
Track change-to-document mappings and surface impact scope
Monitor document freshness and flag content that needs updating
Support bilingual (Chinese/English) navigation and content switching
